title: SPG Sonata 0.15 Visual Acceptance

checks.question: A building body can be represented as one object more often than in the previous baseline.
checks.notes: User QA: Sonata 0.15 improves at least one building-scale merge.

checks.question: Large vertical building objects do not swallow nearby shrubs or rough vegetation faces.
checks.notes: User QA: the shrub face perpendicular to the ground was merged into the same object as the building.

checks.question: Large building objects do not merge adjacent small buildings or independent structures.
checks.notes: User QA: a nearby small building was also merged into the same large object.

checks.question: Delta object 70448 does not over-merge rough vegetation/object fragments with facade or building structure.
Delta object 70415 does not over-merge rough vegetation/object fragments with facade or building structure.

decision_rule: Do not promote Sonata 0.15 until the two failed structural over-merge checks are fixed and all required delta queue checks pass.
